seoTitle: Garden Suburb vs Garema — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Garden Suburb and Garema. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Garden Suburb vs Garema: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Garden Suburb and Garema.
heading: Garden Suburb vs Garema — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Garden Suburb, New South Wales and Garema, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Garema has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Garden Suburb (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Garden Suburb or Garema safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Garden Suburb has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Garema scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Garden Suburb scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Garema scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Garden Suburb or Garema?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Garema has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
